CustomField.description: This field has been created on behalf of Ticket #-INC0314956 to know if the account can be used with CPQ. This one is different from fxSetMergeflag based on below condition: CONTAINS("0001,ZBR1", PKI_SAP_Account_Group__c) AND CONTAINS("Approved", MDM_Status__c)
CustomField.formula: AND( RecordType.Name = 'Customer' , CONTAINS("0001,ZBR1", PKI_SAP_Account_Group__c) , CONTAINS("Approved", MDM_Status__c) , NOT(CONTAINS(Name,'*IDLE*')) , PKI_SAP_Marked_for_Deletion__c = FALSE )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: It helps in identifying the account which can be used with CPQ.
CustomField.label: Use with CPQ
